description: {"description": "Simple leaf, ovate shape, acute apex, entire margin. Prominent reticulate venation visible."} {"description": "Numerous, small, chlorotic flecks and spots are present. Some spots appear slightly raised and may have a subtle halo. No evidence of necrosis or significant tissue deformation."} Lesions are distributed across the entire leaf surface, appearing relatively uniform in density. Higher concentration along the midrib and secondary veins.
